title: SEC0: send_whisper not exposed in NieClient wasm_bindgen API
description: File: wasm/src/api.rs (NieClient impl block) vs wasm/src/client.rs lines 281-301. NieRelayClient::send_whisper() is fully implemented and handles the 'whisper' RPC method and the 'whisper_received' event type is documented in the JS API (api.rs line 149). However, NieClient in api.rs has no send_whisper method. JavaScript callers cannot send direct messages — calling client.send_whisper() from JS results in 'undefined is not a function' at runtime. The NieClient impl block needs a pub fn send_whisper(&self, to: String, text: String) -> js_sys::Promise method analogous to send_message.
